title: Egyptian Creamy Spicy Chicken Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew originating from Egypt, made with chicken, creamy sauce, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken and set aside.
Add the stew to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the cream, spicy sauce, and Egyptian spice blend. Bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pot and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
